description.value:
Prerequisite: To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Hare tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Hare, you gain +1 bonus to all saves (luck).
description.summary: Summon Hare tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Hares; +1 bonus to all saves (luck) within 50 ft of summon.
